description_long: This is a classic American-style roadside mailbox with a rounded top and a rectangular body, mounted on a single wooden post. The mailbox is primarily light gray with a red flag on the right side, which can be raised or lowered to indicate outgoing mail. The front features a curved door embossed with the word 'MAIL' and a handle for opening. The sides of the mailbox have horizontal ridges for structural reinforcement and visual detail. The post is made of wood with a natural grain texture, contrasting with the metallic mailbox. The overall design is utilitarian, weather-resistant, and suitable for suburban or rural street settings.
description: A light gray, rounded-top roadside mailbox with a red flag, mounted on a wooden post and featuring a front-opening door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved door with embossed 'MAIL' text and the handle, as well as the top of the wooden post.
description_view_1: Right side view displaying the red flag in the raised position and the horizontal ridges along the mailbox body.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, curved back of the mailbox and the wooden post, with no visible openings or markings.
description_view_3: Left side view with the flag mechanism visible from the opposite side, showing the mailbox's smooth, ridged surface.
